summary: Iteration 234 — S4 POS DOCX Generator Testing Complete. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including POS generation card, btn-genera-pos button, DOCX download, warning when gate incomplete, success toast with version number.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: session token BccyJvnOyrPXRRYy4GfxR5osuF51RWcYWWnUUoHx434, user_id user_6988e9b9316c. Existing cantiere cant_3894750ebe93 has AI data with 6 fasi, 20 rischi, 10 DPI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: S4 POS DOCX Generator fully working. Key features verified: (1) POST /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id}/genera-pos returns binary DOCX with correct headers (Content-Disposition, X-POS-Versione, X-POS-Completezza). (2) DOCX contains 15+ sections following Allegato XV D.Lgs. 81/2008 structure: Copertina, Intro, Anagrafica, Mansionario, Dati Cantiere, Soggetti, Turni, Subappalti, Misure Prevenzione, DPI, Macchine, Valutazione Rischi, Schede Rischio per Fase, Emergenza, Dichiarazione. (3) DOCX has 21 tables with real cantiere data. (4) Each fase lavorativa generates risk sheet with rischi table + DPI table. (5) GET /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id}/pos-generazioni returns generation history with versione incrementing. (6) pos_generazioni metadata saved in cantiere (timestamp, completezza_al_momento, n_fasi, n_rischi, versione). (7) Frontend Step 4 shows 'Generazione Bozza POS' card with btn-genera-pos button. (8) Frontend button triggers download of DOCX file. (9) Frontend shows warning when gate is not complete (completezza < 100%). (10) Success toast shows version number.
